attributes.style: background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgb(234, 230, 221); padding: 22px; box-shadow: rgba(26, 24, 22, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px; cursor: default; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; gap: 16px;
font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0px; color: rgb(26, 26, 24); letter-spacing: -0.01em;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 22px;
